CaseBranch.description: One branch of an ``op: case`` node.
CaseBranch.title: CaseBranch

Col.description: ``{col: <ident>}`` — reference to a column by name.
Col.title: Col

KpiSpec.description: Explicit scalar-card comparison, target, and sparkline behavior.
KpiSpec.title: KpiSpec

MetricDisplaySpec.description: Presentation metadata shared by reports and catalog authoring surfaces.
MetricDisplaySpec.title: MetricDisplaySpec

OpLog.description: ``{op: log, arg: ..., base?: number}`` — natural log unless ``base`` set.
OpLog.title: OpLog

OpWhenThen.description: ``{op: when_then, cond: ..., then: ..., else: ...}`` — binary conditional.
OpWhenThen.title: OpWhenThen

PageFilterSpec.description: One aggregate-backed page filter exposed by the Reports surface.
PageFilterSpec.title: PageFilterSpec

PolarsExpr.description: ``{polars: <expr>}`` — direct Polars expression text for advanced transforms.
PolarsExpr.title: PolarsExpr

ProcessorTime.description:
Processor time contract.

``column`` is the source timestamp used to derive calendar fields.
``grains`` are user-facing calendar grains. They are normalized to the
internal aggregate names on the parent processor. ``aggregation_levels``
controls the physical row level stored for each grain.
ProcessorTime.title: ProcessorTime

StateSpec.description:
A state column on a processor's aggregate output.

Kind-specific fields (``source_column``, ``lg_k``, ``per_property``,
etc.) are tracked via ``extra='allow'`` for Phase 0.
StateSpec.title: StateSpec

Tile.description:
One tile on a dashboard page.

Required and optional fields per chart kind are documented in
``docs/CHART_CATALOG.md`` §3. We allow extras here so chart-specific
keys (``x``, ``y``, ``color``, ``facets``, ``path``, ``references``,
``value``) don't need their own per-kind schemas at Phase 0.
Tile.title: Tile

TimeFilterSpec.description: Available and default time-range presets for one dashboard page.
TimeFilterSpec.title: TimeFilterSpec

description: Aggregate of the four catalog YAML files for one workspace.
title: Value Stream Catalog
